creator: rkw@eel.dataplex.net
text:
The make commands for XFree86 DEMAND X11_VIA_FTP or
	FROM_CD. But I already have the distribution file
	from a previous fetch.
	IMHO, the option should not be required if the files
	are already in ....../ports/distfiles.

Fix: 

Omit requirement unless a file needs to be fetched.
How-To-Repeat: 
	cd /usr/ports/x11/Xfree86 ; make X11_VIA_FTP=yes
        <interrupt the compiles>
	make
